channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-27 03:24 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Need to find a harder problem for /goal. I haven't even finished my coffee yet.
item.description: Need to find a harder problem for /goal. I haven't even finished my coffee yet.

item.title: @elonmusk: Full duration single-engine static fire test of Starship
item.description: Full duration single-engine static fire test of Starship

item.title: @elonmusk: Good way to frame it. Also, if even one person had died, we would know who they were! Not one person...
item.description: Good way to frame it. Also, if even one person had died, we would know who they were! Not one person has died from stopping waste & fraud at USAID! Obviously.

item.title: @elonmusk: Both can’t be true at the same time
item.description: Both can’t be true at the same time

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Venezuela’s Vice President Delcy Rodríguez thanks@elonmuskand@Starlinkfor providing free c...
item.description: BREAKING: Venezuela’s Vice President Delcy Rodríguez thanks@elonmuskand@Starlinkfor providing free connectivity after the earthquakes.

item.title: @elonmusk: Coming 2027 From Event Film, CITIZEN VIGILANTE 2.@realDonaldTrump@elonmusk@BollFILMS@CitizenVMovie#U...
item.description: Coming 2027 From Event Film, CITIZEN VIGILANTE 2.@realDonaldTrump@elonmusk@BollFILMS@CitizenVMovie#UweBoll#CitizenVigilante

item.title: @elonmusk: Read this article. DEI has only one purpose, and it has nothing to do with social justice or equity....
item.description: Read this article. DEI has only one purpose, and it has nothing to do with social justice or equity. Every person carries a moral frame that precedes any training module: conscience, faith, community. Romans 2:15: the law written on the heart. DEI exists to displace it. The endpoint is moral authority reassignment. Away from God, family, country, conscience. Toward the NGO-Administrative Complex. That's what the training was always for: consultation transfer. The military was a top target because it had to be.

item.title: @elonmusk: In Deutschland ohne Freigabe – Elon Musk stellt ganzen Film von Uwe Boll bei X onlineto.welt.de/QRrI...
item.description: In Deutschland ohne Freigabe – Elon Musk stellt ganzen Film von Uwe Boll bei X onlineto.welt.de/QRrI3OS

item.title: @elonmusk: John Bolton once called for Edward Snowden's execution. He even fantasized how, saying Snowden "ough...
item.description: John Bolton once called for Edward Snowden's execution. He even fantasized how, saying Snowden "ought to swing from a tall oak tree." Bolton is now a convicted felon for mishandling classified information: not to inform the public but to profit off a book. Get the noose.

item.title: @elonmusk: Citizen Vigilante 2 will be even better
item.description: Citizen Vigilante 2 will be even better

item.title: @elonmusk: If removing a few temporary migrants is "ethnic cleansing", then allowing tens of millions of migran...
item.description: If removing a few temporary migrants is "ethnic cleansing", then allowing tens of millions of migrants into a nation against the native population's will is ethnic genocide.

item.title: @elonmusk: Potential name for the AI industry regulatory authority: AI Associated Institute of America, Inc or ...
item.description: Potential name for the AI industry regulatory authority: AI Associated Institute of America, Inc or AIAIAI, pronounced “ay yai yai”
